text.heading: How to make Soy milk
text.p: Healthy soy milk can be made easily at home. In this article we show you how to make your own soy milk for a fraction of the cost when compared to shop bought soy milk.
If you are making soy milk regularly then you may find purchasing a automatic soy milk machine or soy milk maker will save you a good deal of time.
Soak your Soya beans overnight in a large bowl of water (for almost eight to twelve hours).
Put the soaked beans in your food blender and some amount of water. Blend for a minute until all the beans are broken down.
Step 3 - strain the ground bean liquid
Sieve the concretion with a Muslim or cheese clothe, squeeze the cloth so as much of the liquid is extracted as possible.
Place the milk on fire and heat until the milk starts to boil. Boil for about 5 minutes or till the milk stop foaming, then remove the milk from the heat and allow to cool.
Step 5 – flavour and keep in the fridge
